prs_created.description: ci: fix Bulding typo in all sub-workflows and remove redundant autoreconf -i from macOS step (4)
prs_created.note: Workflow files are protected — patch created, maintainer must apply manually. See activity issue for instructions.

notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected - GitHub Actions cannot push them; safeoutputs creates a patch and an issue for manual application. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4). Task 1 labelling is a no-op (no unlabelled issues). Next run: check if CI typo patch was applied; look for more improvements (apt caching for Linux, test coverage for accessor functions, creator, IDE, microdrive).
